title.en: Carotenoid Antenna — Fill the Green Gap

subtitle.en: carotenoids absorb 400-500 nm (the blue-green band chlorophyll misses) and transfer energy to chlorophyll a — they're an antenna and a sunscreen against triplet oxygen damage
subtitle.ko: 카로테노이드가 400-500 nm를 흡수해 chl a로 에너지 전달 — 안테나이자 산소 라디칼 차단제

description.en: Toggle chl-only vs chl+carotenoid. β-carotene's triple-peak 425/450/477 plugs the green gap; combined absorbance covers far more of the visible.
description.ko: chl 단독 vs chl+카로테노이드 토글. β-카로틴 3중 피크 425/450/477이 녹 공백 메움; 결합 흡수가 가시광 거의 전체.
